name: Crime Beat
overview: Small-town crime journalist Abhishek finds his life and career affected by a fugitive gangster. As he gets trapped in a web of lies and motives, what price will he pay- to become a renowned reporter?

trailers.title: Crime Beat | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Saqib Saleem, Saba Azad | Premieres on 21st Feb
